projects.name: ClaudioOS
projects.handoff_excerpt: RTL8168 wired-ethernet driver runs on real HW. Link up at 1000M, TX works, RX blocked. DHCP times out because chip fires zero RX interrupts. Next: chip-variant-specific init (Linux r8169-style CPlusCmd + Config regs). (HANDOFF dated 2026-04-19, no fresh entry today.)
blockers: RTL8168 RX path delivers zero frames — chip-variant-specific init still needed (carry-forward from 2026-04-19)
